name: ZINC8 ENERGY SOLUTI. INC.
summary: ZINC8 ENERGY SOLUTI. INC. is a company focused on developing and commercializing zinc-air flow batteries for energy storage. Their technology is intended to provide long-duration, low-cost energy storage solutions for a variety of applications. Headquartered in Vancouver, Canada, Zinc8 aims to replace traditional energy storage systems with their innovative zinc-air technology.
